overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban commercial district. The player character moves through covered walkways, ascends stairs, and explores an open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping arcade with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered commercial walkway, passing various shop fronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: standing near the pierogi shop entrance

entered.detail: overhead metal and glass structure covering the pedestrian walkway
large pink and green neon sign with 'WIDE OPEN' text
food shop with green neon signage and visible interior
tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements
large planter with mature tree growing in the walkway
pink neon sign with Asian characters and English text
storefront with red neon signage indicating 24-hour operation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian arcade lined with shops and vibrant neon signage. The player walks forward past a pierogi shop and various storefronts with Asian-inspired neon signs, while potted trees and yellow accent lighting decorate the tiled walkway.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs between narrow walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs leading upward from the covered walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow edge markings leading upward
linear fluorescent lights mounted on the left wall
large screen displaying martial arts advertisement with Asian text
underside of the elevated metro track structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a concrete staircase flanked by dark walls and illuminated by linear lights. The enclosed stairway transitions away from the covered arcade below, with a large digital billboard visible on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with food vendors under metro tracks

events.description: exits staircase into open pedestrian plaza with food stalls and elevated metro structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza, passing food vendors and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food cart with green illuminated counter

entered.detail: mobile food stall with green neon lighting and vendor
massive elevated train track structure with yellow and black striped supports
modern building with reflective glass windows and illuminated interior
tall vertical digital screen displaying beverage advertisements
large floating holographic display showing animated advertisements
tall palm tree growing from the plaza floor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into an elevated pedestrian plaza beneath a massive metro structure. The player passes a food vendor cart and walks among scattered pedestrians, with glass buildings on the right and large digital advertising pillars lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive digital displays

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and vertical holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking up at the towering architecture and billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera toward the plaza center

entered.detail: massive futuristic tower with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
giant vertical holographic sign with cyan neon text
building-sized digital display showing corporate advertisements
futuristic entrance to underground transit with yellow neon trim
series of yellow illuminated warning signs on the metro structure

segments.scene_description: The plaza opens up to reveal massive skyscrapers covered in digital billboards and holographic displays. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the vertical neon signage and glass towers, then continues past a subway entrance with yellow neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area with purple neon bar

events.description: approaches outdoor cafe seating with prominent purple neon lighting and umbrella shades

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor seating and approaching the purple-lit bar area

entered.detail: arrangement of round tables and purple illuminated chairs under white umbrellas
outdoor bar structure with vibrant purple neon lighting and counter stools
large white patio umbrellas with red trim providing shade over seating

segments.scene_description: The final segment features an outdoor dining area with purple neon-lit bar counters and modern seating under large umbrellas. The player walks past the empty cafe tables, with the elevated metro structure now visible in the distance and holographic billboards still visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined neon-lit arcade into a sprawling, vertical urban plaza. It begins by moving through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with vibrant Asian-inspired signage and potted trees, before turning toward a concrete staircase where linear lights guide the ascent away from the shops. As the camera emerges from the stairs, the scene opens into an elevated plaza beneath a massive metro structure, passing food vendors and digital advertising pillars. The environment then expands further to reveal towering skyscrapers draped in holographic displays, with the camera tilting upward to capture the scale of the glass towers before passing a yellow-accented subway entrance. Finally, the path leads through an outdoor dining area featuring purple neon bar counters and umbrellas, with the metro structure and distant billboards framing the horizon.
